# STUDY-001 Memory

The discovery study identified a response-associated program that was reproducible across discovery samples. The association was strongest in samples with coordinated immune activation, but discovery data alone could not distinguish marker abundance from tissue organization.

## Open Question

Does the program remain predictive across spatially distinct tissue regions, including immune-poor regions?
